_comment: PodSlacker configuration file. Values here are project defaults and can still be overridden by CLI flags.
_output: Where generated files (summary, audio, HTML, frames) are written. Use an absolute path or a path relative to where you run the command.
_youtube: Optional: path to a Netscape-format cookies.txt (exported from your browser) and/or a proxy URL.
_llm: LLM provider settings. llm_base_url is omitted for OpenAI; set it for OpenRouter or any OpenAI-compatible endpoint.
_per_step: Leave null to use the base LLM settings above for every step.
_tts: TTS engine: 'kokoro' (local, default) or 'openai' (cloud). Kokoro requires no API key; OpenAI TTS requires tts_api_key_env. voice_host1/2 are passed to whichever engine is active.
_prompts: Paths to custom prompt text files. If a file doesn't exist, PodSlacker falls back to the embedded defaults in PodSlacker.Core.dll. Create the file to override the default behaviour.
_github: GitHub Pages publishing. Set publish_github to true and provide a GITHUB_TOKEN env var.
